description: Pre-existing CI issues tracked for incremental resolution. Generated 2026-03-27.

react-hooks/exhaustive-deps.notes: Missing dependencies in useEffect/useCallback/useMemo. Many are intentional (e.g., constants outside render). Fix incrementally.

@typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars.notes: Unused variables in tests (mock destructuring) and some source files. Mostly test boilerplate.

@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any.notes: Explicit 'any' types in admin modules and older code. Replace with proper types incrementally.

@typescript-eslint/no-require-imports.notes: require() in test files for mocking. Convert to ESM imports where possible.

configFix.description: Disabled no-undef rule for TypeScript files (TS compiler handles this). Added ignores for Node.js utility scripts (translate-*, scripts/, lighthouserc.cjs). This resolved 96 false-positive errors.

phpstan.notes: PHPStan runs as warning-only in CI and pre-push hook. Fix errors before promoting to blocking gate.

knownIssues.description: JobApplicationTest has 2 stale test failures (fillable fields + HasTenantScope assertion)

warnings: Some chunks > 500 kB (index, vendor-heroui) — code-splitting improvements tracked separately
